name: one-horizon
description: One Horizon work intelligence for Codex. Log completed work, view planned tasks, surface blockers, and get standup-ready with your team's context.

interface.shortDescription: Work intelligence for planned tasks, blockers, and standups.
interface.longDescription: Connect One Horizon to Codex to inspect planned work, update tasks, capture bugs and feature requests, and run recap workflows without leaving the editor.
defaultPrompt: I found a bug in checkout, fix and log it.
